settings.heading:
Measured Body.
Optimized Life.
settings.subheading: Galim is a new category of preventive healthcare — combining advanced diagnostics, AI, and physician expertise into one comprehensive health assessment.
settings.council_line: Developed by our Medical Council of specialists across every major body system.

settings.heading: Understand how your body performs today, where your biggest future risks are, and exactly what to do next.
settings.body: Thousands of measurements help identify potential future risks, long before they become obvious. One personalized roadmap, powered by AI.

settings.bq_number_caption: = promedio de tu edad. Cada punto arriba lo entrenaste.
settings.bq_copy: BQ: tu cuerpo, en un número. Como el IQ, pero de tu cuerpo — un benchmark vivo de cómo realmente rindes.

settings.heading: Find it a decade early.
settings.body: Most diseases begin years before symptoms appear. Measure your biological age across every major body system and identify potential risks while there's still time to act.

settings.heading: Your body in one number.
settings.body: A single score that measures how your body truly performs — not estimates. Strength, body composition, endurance, and mobility, all in one number.

settings.heading: Choose your measurement.
settings.glp_body: Hasta el 40% de lo que bajas puede ser músculo. El InBody de tu gym te da un número — estimado. Justo cuando bajas rápido es cuando más se equivoca. Performance mide lo que de verdad perdiste: grasa o tu base. Antes de empezar, y otra vez a las 8 semanas.

settings.name: Performance
settings.tagline: Fat loss, gain muscle, fitter life.
settings.features:
• Your BQ score vs. your age group
  • DEXA body fat, muscle & distribution
  • VO₂ Max — fitness & longevity score
  • True strength — not just what you lift
  • Mobility gaps limiting performance
  • AI coach built from your measurement
settings.addon_line: Add-ons: RMR (resting metabolism) · Lactate Threshold (endurance zones)

settings.name: Longevity
settings.tagline: Everything in Performance, plus deep diagnostics.
settings.features:
• Biological age across 8 body systems
  • Advanced blood biomarkers
  • Early health risk detection
  • Your personalized longevity roadmap
  • Galim AI coach

settings.heading: For those who want to optimize even further.
settings.subheading: Optional · available separately · tailored to your age, family history, goals, and Galim results.

settings.heading: We don't just measure. We optimize — exactly to your body.
settings.body_1: A scan is a starting point, not a product. Our method turns every data point — your heart, your blood, your composition, your mobility — into a plan made only for you.
settings.body_2: With every visit, we measure again. And the plan evolves with you.

settings.heading: Body measured. Optimized life.
settings.note: OPENING NOVEMBER 1ST · UNOS DATOS, Y GUARDAMOS TU LUGAR
